text_anchors: The popup window is hidden behind the page content and I can't interact with it.
The modal element is stacking below the main content instead of appearing on top.
I cannot submit my inquiry because the modal is blocked by elements behind it.
positive_node: <div className="modal-overlay fixed inset-0 z-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm px-4">

text_anchors: The header disappears when I scroll down and the content goes on top of it.
The sticky header has no stacking context and is being overlapped by gallery items.
Navigation and branding become hidden when scrolling through the art gallery.
positive_node: <header className="py-12 px-6 md:px-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-8 sticky top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md z-0">

text_anchors: The tabs are stacked on top of each other instead of side by side.
The tab buttons are arranged vertically instead of being in a row.
Navigation between Current, Upcoming and Past tabs is confusing because they are stacked vertically.
The bio section looks squished and unbalanced.
The artist information and social links are all stacked in a single column instead of being side by side on larger screens.
The layout is not taking full advantage of space and feels cramped.
The main heading is way too small and hard to read.
The exhibition title has extremely small font size compared to the page layout.
Visitors cannot easily see the exhibition name because the text is tiny.
positive_node: The Shape of Silence

text_anchors: The artwork titles are barely visible against the white background.
The text color is too light and doesn't have enough contrast with the background.
I can hardly read the names of the artworks displayed in the gallery.
positive_node: {artwork.title}

text_anchors: The form fields are crammed against the edges of the popup window.
The form has no internal padding and the inputs are touching the modal border.
It's difficult to interact with the form fields because there's no space around them.
positive_node: <div className="modal-container bg-white border border-gray-100 w-full max-w-xl p-0 md:p-0 relative shadow-2xl animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-300">

text_anchors: The social media links are too close to the artist name.
There's missing vertical spacing between the name and the social links section.
The layout feels cramped and the social media section runs together with the name.
The Inquire button disappears when I hover over the artwork card.
The opacity is inverted - the button is visible initially then becomes transparent on hover interaction.
I cannot click the Inquire button when I want to because it fades away.
positive_node: <div className="pt-4 flex items-center justify-between opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-500">

text_anchors: There's no visual indicator showing which tab is currently selected.
The underline that shows which tab is active is not visible.
I don't know which exhibition category I'm currently viewing because the indicator is missing.
positive_node: <span className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-px bg-black opacity-0 animate-[scale-x_0.3s_ease-out]" />
